about: Suggest a feature for Panoptes

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What compliance requirement does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Include example CRD YAML if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives have you considered?

## Compliance Context

If this relates to a specific compliance framework, reference the control:
- [ ] PCI-DSS (requirement number)
- [ ] HIPAA (section)
- [ ] SOC2 (criteria)
- [ ] NIST 800-53 (control)
- [ ] GDPR (article)
- [ ] CIS Kubernetes (benchmark)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
